items.name: Smith’ Berry farm
items.notes: Closed Sundays. Their blueberries season seems to be over, last week there were some blueberries left but mostly higher up, not really within younger kids reach. Also the bushes are very overgrown it's hard to walk through most rows without getting scratched by branches. It is a really beautiful property. Maybe they'll have it trimmed in time for next year. Slow down when almost there, it's a hidden driveway that's easy to miss

items.name: Back Mountain Trail
items.notes: trail behind the cheder building in Luzerne. stroller friendly

items.name: Frances Slocum State Park
items.notes: 565 Mt Olivet Rd, Wyoming, PA 18644  •  (570) 696-3525

items.name: Bloomsburg Rail Trail
items.notes: ~3-mile out-and-back; flat gravel & asphalt along Fishing Creek. Bloomsburg, PA.

items.name: Cherry Valley National Wildlife Refuge
items.notes: 3.5+ miles paved (former golf cart paths) through wetlands & meadows. Stroudsburg, PA.

items.name: D&H Rail-Trail
items.notes: Wide crushed-stone, gentle grade; access points across multiple NEPA counties. Union Dale, PA.

items.name: ForEvergreen Nature Preserve
items.notes: 1-mile gravel loop through forest & meadow; bald eagle viewing. East Stroudsburg, PA.

items.name: Greater Hazleton Rails to Trails
items.notes: ~4-mile main section, flat crushed stone; Dreck Creek Reservoir views. Hazle Twp., PA.

items.name: Hawk Mountain Sanctuary
items.notes: Silhouette Trail, crushed stone, max 8% grade to South Lookout. Kempton, PA.

items.name: Iroquois Trail
items.notes: 3.6-mile round-trip crushed stone, gentle grades; Tunkhannock Creek. Tunkhannock, PA.

items.name: Lackawanna River Heritage Trail
items.notes: 70-mile system; Scranton-Taylor 3.5-mile stretch is paved with gentle inclines. Scranton, PA.

items.name: Lake Scranton Walking Trail
items.notes: 3.5-mile paved loop around the reservoir, mostly flat. Scranton, PA.

items.name: Lehigh Canal Park
items.notes: Flat crushed-stone towpath on the D&L Trail along the Lehigh Canal. Weissport, PA.

items.name: Lehigh Gorge Trail
items.notes: 26-mile fine-gravel trail, slight downgrade; good for strollers, bikes & scooters. White Haven, PA.

items.name: Levee Loop Trail
items.notes: 4.5-mile mostly flat grass & gravel along Brodhead Creek. East Stroudsburg, PA.

items.name: Locust Lake State Park
items.notes: 1.3-mile paved Bicycle Trail loop + Oak/Ridge interpretive trail. Barnesville, PA.

items.name: Luzerne County Levee Trail
items.notes: 12 miles paved along the Susquehanna; access to Kirby & Nesbitt Parks. Kingston, PA.

items.name: Luzerne County Rail Trail
items.notes: 1.8-mile paved/crushed stone, gentle grade; river views & public art. Pittston, PA.

items.name: Susquehanna Warrior Trail
items.notes: 12.5-mile hard-packed crushed stone along the Susquehanna. Berwick, PA.

items.name: Trolley Trail
items.notes: Clarks Summit-Dalton ~3 mi one-way; smooth surface, gentle grade. Clarks Summit, PA.

items.name: Wallenpaupack Lake Trail
items.notes: 1.5-mile paved trail along the dike; lake views & learning center. Hawley, PA.
